text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! HBD to the B-day girl, K.S.Miracle! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday. May you have a wonderful year
ahead.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you sure you don't wanna party? For you,
Miram, I'll assemble a gajillion peeps!

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
That's a lot of peeps. Where could we fit a
gajillion people?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe there's such a venue anywhere on
this planet.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Come ooon, don't you wanna let loose?

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you guys are too kind. The sentiment is
more than enough for me. It's the best present I
could ask for.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
...It's time to say another thank you... to the
"miracle" that introduced me to such kindness.
